title: Add bulk todo actions
summary: Added multi-select and bulk completion controls on branch todo/session-bulk-actions, later integrated into todo/review-toolbar where selection controls overlap with filter toolbar layout and row actions.
goal: Support batch triage actions for review sessions where multiple tasks need the same follow-up.
changesMade: Added row selection state separate from task completion state
Added a bulk action toolbar with mark-done and clear-selection actions
Surfaced row selection status beside each task

features.name: bulk todo actions
features.why: Reviewers often need to mark a group of tasks done during cleanup instead of repeating the same action row by row.

decisions.decision: Keep selection separate from completion state
decisions.why: A reviewer may want to stage a working set before applying a bulk action, and that should not overload the existing done checkbox.

blockers: Merging with filter tabs changes the same toolbar area and row-leading controls in App.jsx.
openQuestions: Should bulk actions also support archive or delete?
Should selected rows stay selected when filters hide them?
resumePrompt: Continue the bulk triage work. Preserve multi-select behavior and the bulk action toolbar when resolving conflicts on todo/review-toolbar or todo/conflict-resolution.
